name: Mail Agent
description: AI-powered Gmail monitor. Watches your inbox via Google Pub/Sub, classifies emails with LLM, pushes important ones to Telegram. Requires gog + gcloud + GCP project.

chatId.description: Telegram chat/group ID to deliver notifications to

llmApiKey.description: OpenAI (or compatible) API key for email classification. Stored in OpenClaw plugin config — confirm your OpenClaw config is secured.

credentialsPath.description: Path to Google credentials JSON (optional if ADC already configured via gcloud)
